title: Reliance Footprint is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Reliance Footprint is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Footprint! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Footprint:
Reliance Footprint is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint!
